nextAllowedMove: RM1 documentation BUILD is self-reported complete and has been repaired twice (docs/reviews/RM1_BUILD_EVIDENCE_2026-07-23.md Section 10): roadmap rewritten and repaired (509 lines), learning assessment authored and repaired (256 lines, 161/161 candidates classified), continuity updated -- all strictly within the IMPLEMENTATION_WORKER-only ceiling; docs/reviews/RM1_INDEPENDENT_REVIEW_2026-07-23.md was not touched (Codex-only C3 ceiling); nothing was staged, committed, or pushed. BUILD repair round 1 closed RM1-BR1 (BLOCKED_CONTINUITY_DRIFT, continuity-only). BUILD repair round 2 closed RM1-BR2 (target commit pins now explicit in the roadmap: RM1 input-verification baseline 34519a3b17b416b11f64bae1da602c8fb9a7eb1a, RM1 authorization/BUILD baseline C1 ed0d1cd7ea70a51ed8e350afed8cc3b38647ca45), RM1-BR3 (F2 expanded into fully-structured F2A-F2G sub-tranches), RM1-BR4 (all six RM1-AC-06 exclusions now explicit in the roadmap itself), RM1-BR5 (learning-assessment phase-domain count corrected from a mislabeled 55 to the true 56, with no change to the 156/161 totals or 0/99/42/20 dispositions), and RM1-BR6 (BUILD evidence's false 'docs/roadmaps/ contains exactly one file' claim corrected -- it contains two: the roadmap and a pre-existing, untouched README.md folder-family stub). This file's own currentMode/activePhase/activeRole were already correct and remain unchanged by both repair rounds. Codex now acts as independent REVIEWER over the BUILD evidence as repaired, against OW-RM1-SPEC-001's RM1-AC-01 through RM1-AC-26. Only after REVIEW_PASS may Codex COMMIT_STEWARD stage/commit/rehearse/push C2/C3, and CLOSER/SESSION_SYNC_STEWARD close the tranche. F1A remains not opened.
